scams.avoid: Use Grab app only. Never street hail.
scams.action: Download Grab before landing. Always check plate matches app.

scams.avoid: Keep phone in front pocket. No back pocket wallet.
scams.action: Money belt under clothes. Minimal cash out.

scams.avoid: Don't hold phone near road edge.
scams.action: Walk on building side of sidewalk. Cross-body bag.
Book at hotel reception or local agencies. Walk-in prices 50% lower.

scams.avoid: Only use Grab or Mai Linh taxi
scams.action: Agree price before getting in if no Grab.

scams.scam: Duong Dong night market per-100g pricing trap
scams.action: Ask 'how much total?' not 'how much per 100g'.

scams.avoid: NEVER take cyclos. Walk or Grab.
scams.action: Politely refuse. If trapped, pay ₹500 max and walk away.
If they already started, pay ₹100 max.

scams.avoid: Book through hotel. Official guides have ID.
scams.action: Demand official guide card. Refuse 'free' offers.
Photograph boat name. Complain on the spot if different.
Buy at city center, not airport. ~₹500 for 5GB/7 days.

scams.avoid: Only exchange at banks or official counters.
scams.action: Count money yourself before leaving counter. Use ATM instead.

top_3_threats.action: Download Grab app BEFORE landing. Never street hail.
Buy SIM in city center (~₹500 vs ₹2000 at airport)
NEVER engage. Walk away. Don't stop.

Hanoi: Cyclo stand near Hoan Kiem Lake
Shoe shine guys in Old Quarter

emergency_actions: If scammed: Don't argue. Walk away. ₹500 loss is not worth conflict.
If pickpocketed: Cancel cards immediately. File police report for insurance.
If overcharged: Pay and leave. Negative review is your revenge.
If threatened: Call 113 (police). Indian Embassy: Hanoi +84-24-38239899
